#  Email Submittals (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:** 'Standard' or 'Admin' on the project's Submittals tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool from an iOS device.
  2. Tap the submittal you want to email.
  3. Tap **Email**![Icon Email](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/52df2ef5cdda4c5878a1dc19e627bfef/51c0ad6d5d04a6ba4171029f2a1fe086/icon-email.png?fm=webp&h=16). 
![Email Submittal Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fe4f8ff741531c39a95b486683f47c77/dea63e26c4000ffb9a0c3283680a5d74/email-submittal-ios.png?fm=webp)
  4. Tap into the following fields to enter the appropriate information:
     * **Subject:** The default subject will be auto-populated with the submittal's name and number. Tap the 'Subject' field to edit the subject.
     * **To:** Tap the 'To' field to select the user(s) or groups who will receive the email.
     * **CC:** (Optional) Tap the 'CC' field to include other users you want to copy on the email. You will automatically be copied on the email.
       * On the 'Select CC Recipients' screen, select the button next to each user you want to include in the CC list and tap **Done**.
     * **BCC:** (Optional) Tap the 'BCC' field to blind carbon copy other users on the email.
       * On the 'Select BCC Recipients' screen, select the button next to each user you want to include in the BCC list and tap **Done**.
     * **Description:** (Optional) Tap the field to enter text that will appear in the body of email.
  5. Tap **Send**.


## See Also
  * [View Submittal PDF Attachments (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/tutorials/view-submittal-pdf-attachments-ios)
  * [View a Submittal (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/tutorials/view-a-submittal-ios)
  * [Search for and Filter Submittals (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-submittals-ios)
title: Email Submittals (iOS)
description: How to email a submittal from your iOS mobile device.
